text.message: Hey SnackJar, how are you doing ^^
you left so much in the middle red
im just saying they are going to have so much space
& black, you made that decision to leave the board
i just cant believe im getting solo'd
and robbed by both of you
In fairness my rob was my first roll
still hurts me a lot sadly
i can trade you stuff black
wasnt a good block i will admit
can you roll this off me
everyone else has a triple hex or a city
Can't trade you city here blue
i will add free nb next tim i roll a 7
just drop your roads and pass
blue is the objective leader here black
i have no decision power here
red if you wanna BTT you can help me with road
you have space for road I dont
yes im saying help me with road
oj also gets a point per 4 roll
boy i wish he was blocked
not a single rob this game for him
I can't break my city here
im matching anything you offer red
we're both not winning this realistically lol
I have to OWS fight someone with 2x tiles
they have wood port on all #s
just take settle for now oj
you are ahead on production, about to get a port
I can't get road or army
Game will go to the army player this game
I have 2 numbers that have over rolled
If blue is scary we trade black road
im not doing it for free shades
I get it you don’t need to steal
you gotta give me a chance
i wont take road for free to give you two a winning chnace
you dropping 2 roads is for your own game
if I roll brick ill trade it
you placing poorly has nothing to do with how I trade
I make no wheat and cannot connect for road. that's the facts.
Black can I get a wheat?
blue will DP if you don't connect
That has nothing to do with me winning or not
can i get the 2nd wood on my turn?
Blue is 9 here with a knight
and then a free wood on my turn pls
Me and OJ are diving ATP
a connect avoids DP from blue
I'll do a 2;1 if oj does
you owe me a free wood oj
otherwise im holding it for myself
ill just take my free wood
can we keep this 2:1? or do you wnat the brick back
if you NB to city we lose here
We could have given you road black
im not doing it for free
